data.title: Implement format_trailer_flags in apply-attribution-trailers.sh
data.description: Implement format_trailer_flags() in plugins/dso/scripts/apply-attribution-trailers.sh. Reads attribution-contributors.jsonl (via read_and_deduplicate output), emits one --trailer 'DSO-Agent: <value>' line per unique subagent_type, one --trailer 'DSO-Skill: <value>' per unique skill_name, one --trailer 'DSO-Model: <value>' per unique model. Scalar trailers are a placeholder (T4-impl fills them). AC: (1) 2 distinct subagent_type values -> exactly 2 '--trailer DSO-Agent:' lines (use grep -c '^--trailer' not wc -c); (2) empty JSONL -> no output (use test -z or grep -c . equals 0); (3) skill entry -> DSO-Skill flag present; (4) all T3b-test tests pass; (5) validate.sh --ci passes.
